GenAiFunction.description: Creates a native Salesforce report via the Analytics API. Requires: reportName, reportType (from List Report Types), columns (from Get Report Type Columns). Supports TABULAR, SUMMARY, MATRIX formats with groupings (dateGranularity, sortOrder). Filtering: single filter, multi-filter (filtersJson), filter logic (reportBooleanFilter), cross-filters (crossFiltersJson), dateFilter. Options: scope, folderName. Advanced: bucketsJson, customDetailFormulasJson, customSummaryFormulaJson.
